violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.

INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Insects noted infesting the food service establishment. Large amount of fruit flys and other flys noted. Advised to take out empty bottle containers wipe down all surfaces and clean more at night before closing to help control.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.
